title: HtmlHelp
text: HtmlHelp For applications deployed on Windows, specifies whether the native online help is HTML-based or WinHelp. HtmlHelp = TRUE | FALSE Default value: TRUE File section: [help] Description The ProcScript help statement is used to call online help, either in the form of Uniface help texts or HTML files. By default, Uniface opens the default Web browser and tries to load the named help topic with an .htm extension. If the files does not exist, it retries with an .html extension. If HtmlHelp is set to false, it looks for files with the .hlp extension for the now-obsolete Windows help format. [help] HtmlHelp=TRUE Copy Given the following ProcScript, Uniface first looks for the file UUEXTN20.HTM . If it does not find it, it looks for UUEXTN20.HTML . help /topic "UUEXTN20" Copy Related Links help Display help information, either a Uniface help message or information from the native help system.
